title: T-019 — SSCC server-side generation service + ZPL print queue stub (11-shipping-e)
prompt:
# T-019 — SSCC generation service + ZPL print queue

PRD: docs/prd/11-SHIPPING-PRD.md §13.1 SSCC-18 generation, §13.2 GS1-128 barcode, §11 V-SHIP-PACK-02/03/04, V-SHIP-LBL-02/03, §6 D-SHP-4 GS1 compliance
Prototype refs: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/pack-screens.jsx:317-336 (sscc_label_preview_component), :224-314 (sscc_labels_queue_page); modals.jsx:702-739 (sscc_preview_reprint_modal)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Node service `sscc-generation-service.ts` wrapping Postgres `generate_sscc()` (T-018) and a ZPL print queue stub. Server-side only (V-SHIP-LBL-03 mod-10 check; never client).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/lib/services/sscc-generation-service.ts` exports:
   - `generateSsccForBox(boxId): Promise<string>` — calls Postgres generate_sscc(org_id, extension=0); INSERTs into `sscc_labels` table (new table this task introduces: org_id, sscc, shipment_box_id FK, generated_at, printed_at NULL, printer_id NULL); UPDATEs shipment_boxes.sscc. Atomic single tx.
   - `enqueueZplJob(ssccId, printerId)` — INSERT into `zpl_print_jobs` table (org_id, sscc_id FK, printer_id FK references printers (02-SETTINGS), zpl_text text, status text CHECK ('queued','printing','printed','failed'), enqueued_at, printed_at NULL). Returns jobId.
   - `reprintSscc(ssccId, reason)` — re-enqueues ZPL job + audits to shipping_audit_log; outbox `shipping.sscc.reprinted` permission `ship.pack.close`.
   - `verifySscc(sscc18: string): { valid: boolean, gs1_prefix: string, serial: string, checkDigit: { computed, embedded, match } }` — pure utility for QA/auditing.
2. Migration adds `sscc_labels` + `zpl_print_jobs` tables (RLS via app.current_org_id() + R13).
3. ZPL text generated server-side per GS1-128 spec — contains AI(00)<SSCC18> + AI(02)<GTIN> + AI(10)<LOT> + AI(15)<BBE> at minimum.
4. P1: ZPL job dequeue is a stub — `apps/worker/src/jobs/zpl-print.ts` registers a 10s interval consumer that marks queued jobs as `printed` after fake 1s delay (real printer integration P2). Use @monopilot/worker T-111 JobRegistry.
5. All mutations under `withOrgContext`. No GUC reads. PII redact (none here but pino default).

## Files
- apps/web/lib/services/sscc-generation-service.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/__tests__/sscc-generation-service.test.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/00XX_shipping_sscc_labels_zpl.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/shipping/sscc-labels.ts [create]
- apps/worker/src/jobs/zpl-print.ts [create]
- apps/worker/src/jobs/__tests__/zpl-print.test.ts [create]
- packages/events/src/shipping.ts [modify — ShippingSsccReprinted]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a shipment_box without sscc, when generateSsccForBox runs, then a row is INSERTed into sscc_labels and shipment_boxes.sscc UPDATEd in the same tx; sscc is 18 digits and passes mod-10 (V-SHIP-LBL-03).
2. Given organizations.gs1_company_prefix is NULL, when generateSsccForBox runs, then the Postgres function raises and the service rethrows V-SHIP-PACK-03 (no row created).
3. Given enqueueZplJob runs, when sscc + printer exist, then zpl_print_jobs row INSERTed with status='queued'; the apps/worker consumer marks it 'printed' within 30s (test uses fake timer).
4. Given verifySscc('123456789012345670') is called, when the function runs, then it returns { valid: true|false, gs1_prefix, serial, checkDigit: { computed, embedded, match } } based on mod-10 server-side.
5. Given grep current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id') on sscc-generation-service.ts, when run, then zero matches.
6. Given two concurrent generateSsccForBox calls for the same org, when run, then atomic counter (T-018) guarantees no duplicate sscc returned.

## Test strategy
- RED: vitest with testcontainers Postgres + fake timers; assert AC 1-6 + GS1 test vectors for mod-10.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run sscc-generation-service.test.ts && pnpm --filter @monopilot/worker vitest run zpl-print.test.ts && pnpm typecheck`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not compute mod-10 client-side.
- Do not enqueue ZPL outside DB tx as sscc_labels INSERT.
- Do not skip outbox event for reprintSscc (audit).
- Do not bypass V-SHIP-PACK-03 gs1_prefix gate.
- Do not call mutations outside withOrgContext.
- Do not introduce printer integrations in P1 (stub only).

pipeline_inputs.description: SSCC-18 server-side generation service + ZPL print queue stub + verifySscc utility; consumer of T-018 generate_sscc().
pipeline_inputs.details: Adds sscc_labels + zpl_print_jobs tables. apps/worker consumer is a stub for P1 (no real printer integration). GS1-128 ZPL contains AI(00)(02)(10)(15) at minimum.
out_of_scope: Do not implement real printer integrations (Phase 2).
acceptance_criteria: Given a shipment_box without sscc, when generateSsccForBox runs, then sscc_labels row INSERTed + shipment_boxes.sscc UPDATED in same tx; AND given organizations.gs1_company_prefix is NULL, when generateSsccForBox runs, then service rethrows V-SHIP-PACK-03 and no DB write.
Given enqueueZplJob runs with sscc + printer, when apps/worker consumes the job, then ZPL sent to printer and job status becomes 'delivered' (or 'failed' with DLQ on printer error).
Given verifySscc(18-digit), when function runs, then returns { valid, gs1_prefix, serial, checkDigit: { computed, embedded, matches } }.

Given two concurrent generateSsccForBox calls for same org, when run, then atomic counter guarantees no duplicate SSCC; AND grep current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id') on sscc-generation-service.ts returns zero matches.
test_strategy: RED: vitest with testcontainers Postgres + fake timers asserting AC 1-6 + GS1 test vectors for mod-10.
Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run sscc-generation-service.test.ts && pnpm --filter @monopilot/worker vitest run zpl-print.test.ts && pnpm typecheck`.
risk_red_lines: Do not enqueue ZPL outside DB tx as sscc_labels INSERT.
Do not skip outbox for reprintSscc (audit).
Do not call mutations outside withOrgContext.
Do not introduce real printer integrations in P1.
